items.title: Four trade candidates, 16 offers, just one deal: W...
items.body_text: We proposed trade offers for Keon Coleman, Cole Kmet, Anthony Richardson Sr. and Kayvon Thibodeaux. Could any of them be on the move?
items.author: Courtney Cronin, Jeremy Fowler, Alaina Getzenberg, Dan Graziano, Stephen Holder, Jordan Raanan, Ben Solak and Seth Walder

items.title: Pack's Jacobs facing domestic violence charges
items.body_text: Packers running back Josh Jacobs was arrested Tuesday and booked on several domestic violence charges, according to the Hobart-Lawrence (Wisconsin) Police Department.

items.title: Chiefs' Kelce joining Guardians ownership group
items.body_text: Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce is joining the Guardians' ownership group as a minority investor, he told ESPN, purchasing a stake in the team he grew up watching.
items.author: Jeff Passan

items.title: Chargers make James highest-paid safety again
items.body_text: The Chargers and Derwin James Jr. agreed to a three-year, $75.6 million contract extension, making him the highest-paid safety for the second time in his career, his agent David Mulugheta told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Tuesday.
items.author: Kris Rhim

items.title: Sources: Mahomes on field for first OTA practice
items.body_text: Chiefs QB Patrick Mahomes returned to the field with his teammates Tuesday for the first time since tearing the ACL and LCL in his left knee.
items.author: Nate Taylor

items.title: Texans WR Collins gets raise in reworked contract
items.body_text: Two-time Pro Bowl wide receiver Nico Collins and the Texans reached agreement on an adjusted contract that guarantees his salary the next two seasons and includes a $9 million cash increase this year and an $8 million cash increase next year.
items.author: DJ Bien-Aime

items.title: Macdonald: Seahawks want to 'run it forward'
items.body_text: As the Seahawks look to repeat as Super Bowl champions, they aren't talking about defending their title or "running it back."
items.author: Brady Henderson

items.title: Flores' discrimination suit vs. NFL can go to tria...
items.body_text: The Supreme Court refused to intervene in a discrimination lawsuit led by former Dolphins coach Brian Flores against the NFL, allowing the case to proceed toward trial. The NFL had hoped to handle the case through its own arbitration process.

items.title: Suspects in athlete break-ins arrested in Argentin...
items.body_text: Men suspected of being part of a transnational gang that orchestrated burglaries at the homes of well-known athletes, including stars from the NBA and NFL, have been arrested in Argentina.

items.title: ✂️ Lawrence concerns family with faux haircut
items.body_text: The Jaguars quarterback's trademark flowing blonde hair disappeared during the team's schedule reveal video.
items.author: Michael Dirocco

items.title: The next step in Nik Bonitto's rise to stardom? Pr...
items.body_text: Bonitto set a career high with 14 sacks last season, but he knows that he'll be facing more double-teams and chips in 2026.
items.author: Jeff Legwold

items.title: Who are the top quarterbacks in next year's NFL dr...
items.body_text: Next year's QB draft class should be loaded, with big names such as Arch Manning, Dante Moore, CJ Carr and Trinidad Chambliss. Here's what you need to know.
items.author: Jordan Reid

items.title: Final UFL Power Rankings: Which team tops the list...
items.body_text: The final UFL Power Rankings feature familiar teams at the top and include each team's season grade.
items.author: Matt Willis
